name: email-validator-ai-mcp
description: Email validation, MX checking, disposable detection, and typo correction.

tools.name: validate_email
tools.description: Validate an email address format, structure, and common issues.

tools.name: check_mx
tools.description: Check if a domain has valid MX (mail exchange) records.

tools.name: detect_disposable
tools.description: Detect if an email uses a disposable/temporary email service.

tools.name: suggest_correction
tools.description: Suggest corrections for common email typos (e.g., gmial.com -> gmail.com).
